summary: Frontend testing for new full-width dashboard layout with top navigation. MAJOR LAYOUT CHANGE verified: Sidebar hidden via CSS (#kt_app_sidebar { display: none }), Metronic header hidden (#kt_app_header { display: none }). New top navigation built inside DashboardListCards.jsx with all nav links working. All core dashboard features PASSED.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection failures and slow response times (5-15 seconds) - external dependency, not a code issue

issues: React warning: 'key' prop missing in PrivateRoutes, SidebarMenuMain, ChatMessage - minor, non-blocking
React warning: non-boolean attribute 'full' on button - minor

context_for_next_testing_agent: Full-width dashboard layout tested and working. Sidebar hidden via CSS (#kt_app_sidebar { display: none }), Metronic header hidden (#kt_app_header { display: none }). New top navigation built inside DashboardListCards.jsx with 7 nav links (Dashboard active/blue, Engins, Tags, Map, Calendrier, Rapports, Utilisateurs). Navigation uses window.location.href. Layout: Top nav sticky -> Hero section -> 4 KPI cards -> Map(60%) + Alerts(40%) -> 4 analytics columns. CSS class prefix is 'dbn-'. Background is #F1F5F9, cards are white with 14px border-radius, max-width 1600px. External API (Omniyat) has slow response times (5-15 seconds). Login credentials: admin / user@1234.
